description: Style NoteThis lomani deodorant for women understands you - a versatile fragrance that will keep you smelling good all day, you can wear it for a casual coffee date or a candle lit dinner (the smell is mild, so it won't overpower your expensive perfume!) It lasts really long, so you don't have to worry about those embarrassing sweat patches in the after hours!Product DetailsLomani Pleasures is a deodorant for women that comes in an aerosol spray canister that has a shiny silver topCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize   200 ml
